corrections.note: Final sigma misread; apparatus has κρατος.

corrections.current: μετα τοσσης γ̅ μετα πασης ℵc.a
corrections.correct: μετα τοσσης ℵ* μετα πασης ℵc.a
corrections.note: The siglum after μετα τοσσης is ℵ*, not γ̅.

notes: Body text and running head match the scan. Apparatus otherwise matches, including nomina sacra θ̅ι̅ and superscript/rasure notes.
